name: source-file: rules array with two entries sharing the same id is rejected (collision detected)
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: A
  authoritative_url: https://a.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules:
  - {id: dup, name: a, description: x, detector: x}
  - {id: dup, name: b, description: y, detector: y}
recommended_set: []
all_set: [dup]
' > rule.yaml
